title: Wise Man's Mask
description: The iron mask of Sir Ansbach, giving the appearance of a quiet, wise, old bearded man. But an old fear lurks beneath, together with the cold, unflinching discipline that once honed his blade, now employed to enhance Blood Oath and dynastic skills.

title: Ansbach's Attire
description: Attire worn by Sir Ansbach. A restrained and somber garb, reflecting the disciplined bearing of a former servant of the dynasty. Slightly increases the power of Blood Oath and dynastic skills.

title: Ansbach's Manchettes
description: Manchettes worn by Sir Ansbach. Minimalist arm guards of refined make, befitting a disciplined operative of the Blood Lord's court. Slightly increases the power of Blood Oath and dynastic skills.

title: Ansbach's Boots
description: Boots worn by Sir Ansbach. Supple leather boots suited to quiet movement and swift action. Slightly increases the power of Blood Oath and dynastic skills.

title: Curseblade Mask
description: Mask worn by Curseblades, ascetic warriors who have honed their bodies to a razor's edge. The dark cloth wrapped around the face conceals their identity as they carry out silent contracts.

title: Ascetic's Loincloth
description: Loincloth worn by Curseblades. Simple cloth garment that grants great freedom of movement, worn by those who have stripped away all excess in pursuit of killing perfection.

title: Ascetic's Wrist Guards
description: Wrist guards worn by Curseblades. Minimal protection for the forearms, allowing the wearer to strike swiftly without impediment.

title: Ascetic's Ankle Guards
description: Ankle guards worn by Curseblades. Light wrappings that protect the lower leg while preserving the nimble footwork of these deadly assassins.

title: Black Knight Helm
description: Helm worn by Black Knights, the elite warriors of the realm of shadow. The blackened steel bears a white plume, a mark of distinction among those who served faithfully in the ancient purge. It reeks of death.

title: Black Knight Armor
description: Armor worn by Black Knights of the realm of shadow. Black steel forged for those who carried out the unsung purge. A small circular shield adorns the chest. It reeks of death.

title: Black Knight Gauntlets
description: Gauntlets worn by Black Knights of the realm of shadow. Part of the blackened steel armor set of those who served in the ancient and unsung purge. They reek of death.

title: Black Knight Greaves
description: Greaves worn by Black Knights of the realm of shadow. Part of the blackened steel armor set of those who carried out the ancient purge at the behest of their lord. They reek of death.

title: Common Soldier Helm
description: Helm worn by the common soldiers of the realm of shadow. Plain iron headgear issued to rank-and-file troops, offering basic protection without distinction.

title: Common Soldier Cloth Armor
description: Cloth armor worn by the common soldiers of the realm of shadow. Standard-issue attire for the foot soldiers, reinforced with modest padding to ward off light blows.

title: Common Soldier Gauntlets
description: Gauntlets worn by the common soldiers of the realm of shadow. Simple arm guards issued to common troops throughout the shadow realm.

title: Common Soldier Greaves
description: Greaves worn by the common soldiers of the realm of shadow. Basic leg armor issued to foot soldiers, providing modest protection for those who march in service of the shadow realm.

title: Dancer's Hood
description: Hood worn by the Dancer of Ranah. A sheer veil of fine cloth that frames the face of those who perform the sacred dances, partially concealing their features.

title: Dancer's Dress
description: Dress worn by the Dancer of Ranah. Flowing garb made for the sacred dances performed in the realm of shadow. Each piece of this set slightly enhances the power of dancing attacks.

title: Dancer's Bracer
description: Bracer worn by the Dancer of Ranah. Ornamented arm bands adorning the wrists of the sacred dancer, allowing uninhibited movement while slightly enhancing the power of dancing attacks.

title: Dancer's Trousers
description: Trousers worn by the Dancer of Ranah. Light flowing lower garment worn during the sacred dances. Each piece slightly enhances the power of dancing attacks.

title: Dane's Hat
description: Hat worn by Dryleaf Dane. A wide-brimmed traveling hat befitting a wandering martial ascetic who has walked far roads in pursuit of the discipline of dryleaf combat.

title: Dryleaf Robe
description: Robe worn by the Dryleaf practitioners. A long traveling robe that speaks of a contemplative life on the road. Worn by those who practice the unarmed dryleaf discipline.

title: Dryleaf Arm Wraps
description: Arm wraps worn by the Dryleaf practitioners. Simple cloth wrappings protecting the forearms and hands for those who rely on unarmed combat techniques.

title: Dryleaf Cuissardes
description: Leg wraps worn by the Dryleaf practitioners. Flowing lower garments worn by the wandering martial ascetics who follow the dryleaf discipline.

title: Death Knight Helm
description: Helm worn by Death Knights, cadaver surrogates who serve as vessels for the will of the Prince of Death. The skull-visaged helmet declares their allegiance to Godwyn and the ancient dragon cult.

title: Death Knight Armor
description: Armor worn by Death Knights. Dark chainmail adorned with eight-pointed stars, worn by those who serve as cadaver surrogates in the name of Godwyn. Slightly enhances skills and incantations of the ancient dragon cult.

title: Death Knight Gauntlets
description: Gauntlets worn by Death Knights. Part of the dark armor set of those who serve as cadaver surrogates for the Prince of Death. Slightly enhances skills and incantations of the ancient dragon cult.

title: Death Knight Greaves
description: Greaves worn by Death Knights. Part of the dark armor set of the cadaver surrogates dedicated to the memory of Godwyn the Golden. Slightly enhances skills and incantations of the ancient dragon cult.

title: Divine Beast Helm
description: Helm worn by Divine Beast Warriors, Horned Warriors chosen to serve as vessels of the dancing lion. The elaborate headdress marks them as warriors elevated to represent the divine beast.

title: Divine Beast Warrior Armor
description: Armor worn by Divine Beast Warriors. Heavy chest armor of those chosen to embody the divine beast, granting extra strength and dexterity to those who wear it.

title: Divine Bird Helm
description: Helm worn by Divine Bird Warriors. An elaborate bird-headed helm that transforms the wearer into a vessel of the ancient divine bird. Boosts the user's strength and dexterity, and empowers Divine Bird Feathers.

title: Divine Bird Warrior Armor
description: Armor worn by Divine Bird Warriors. Heavy layered armor adorned with feathers, worn by warriors who have taken on the aspect of the ancient divine bird. Enhances kick attacks.

title: Divine Bird Warrior Gauntlets
description: Gauntlets worn by Divine Bird Warriors. Part of the feathered armor set of those who embody the divine bird, featuring talon-like appendages.

title: Divine Bird Warrior Greaves
description: Greaves worn by Divine Bird Warriors. Part of the feathered armor set of those who embody the divine bird, featuring elongated bird-leg feet.

title: Fire Knight Helm
description: Helm worn by Fire Knights who serve in the Shadow Keep. The tall, pointed helm is the mark of Messmer's elite knights. Slightly boosts maximum HP, stamina, and equip load.

title: Fire Knight Armor
description: Armor worn by Fire Knights who serve in the Shadow Keep. A red-caped chest armor emblazoned with Messmer's serpent motif. Slightly boosts the power of Messmer's flame incantations.

title: Fire Knight Gauntlets
description: Gauntlets worn by Fire Knights who serve in the Shadow Keep. Part of the imposing armor set of Messmer's elite flame-wielding soldiers.

title: Fire Knight Greaves
description: Greaves worn by Fire Knights who serve in the Shadow Keep. Part of the imposing armor set of those who wield Messmer's flame in service of the shadow realm.

title: Freyja's Helm
description: Helm worn by Redmane Freyja. A crested war helm of the Redmane Knights, bearing the proud bearing of a warrior who has pledged herself to a cause greater than herself.

title: Freyja's Armor
description: Armor worn by Redmane Freyja. A sturdy chest plate of the Redmane Knights, reflecting the valor of a general who followed her lord even into the realm of shadow.

title: Freyja's Gauntlets
description: Gauntlets worn by Redmane Freyja. Part of the Redmane Knight armor set worn by the staunch general who accompanied her master to the Land of Shadow.

title: Freyja's Greaves
description: Greaves worn by Redmane Freyja. Part of the Redmane Knight armor set of the loyal general who pledged her blade to the shadow realm's cause.

title: Gaius's Helm
description: Helm worn by Commander Gaius. A massive iron helm adorned with overlapping plates like the scales of some great beast, reflecting the commander's imposing presence on the battlefield.

title: Gaius's Armor
description: Armor worn by Commander Gaius. Massive layered plate armor that makes the wearer appear almost as wide as they are tall. The many overlapping plates offer exceptional protection against slash and pierce damage.

title: Gaius's Gauntlets
description: Gauntlets worn by Commander Gaius. Part of the massive armor set of the mounted commander, offering excellent protection at the cost of substantial weight.

title: Gaius's Greaves
description: Greaves fashioned for Commander Gaius. Made as a cruel jest for an albinauric who has no use for legs, these greaves were nonetheless crafted with care and offer solid protection.

title: Gravebird Helm
description: Helm worn by the Gravebirds, ancient guardians of the realm of shadow. Adorned with dark feathers and a hooded silhouette, it empowers spells that summon rings of spectral light.

title: Gravebird's Blackquill Armor
description: Chest armor of the Gravebirds, ancient guardian birds of the realm of shadow. The dark plumage cloak grants the wearer an ominous silhouette. Increases the power of jumping attacks.

title: Gravebird Armor
description: Chest armor of the Gravebirds found in the Gravesite Plain. A lighter variant of the Blackquill Armor, worn by gravebirds in the early reaches of the realm of shadow. Does not grant the jump attack bonus.

title: Gravebird Bracelets
description: Bracelets worn by the Gravebirds. Feathered adornments for the wrists, worn by the dark guardian birds of the realm of shadow.

title: Gravebird Anklets
description: Anklets worn by the Gravebirds. Feathered lower leg adornments of the ancient guardian birds, found in the poison swamps north of Moorth Ruins.

title: High Priest Hat
description: Hat worn by Count Ymir, High Priest of the Cathedral of Manus Metyr. An ornate hat befitting a scholar of the fingers, adorned with a peacock-feather collar that speaks of elevated station.

title: High Priest Robe
description: Robe worn by Count Ymir, High Priest of the Cathedral of Manus Metyr. A richly adorned robe of a high-ranking servant of the Two Fingers. Can be converted into the Finger Robe.

title: High Priest Gloves
description: Gloves worn by Count Ymir, High Priest of the Cathedral of Manus Metyr. Refined gloves befitting a scholar of high station who devotes himself to the study of the Two Fingers.

title: High Priest Undergarments
description: Undergarments worn by Count Ymir, High Priest of the Cathedral of Manus Metyr. Simple lower garments worn beneath the ceremonial robes of the high priest.

title: Horned Warrior Helm
description: Helm worn by the Horned Warriors of the realm of shadow. An ancient war helm adorned with curved horns, worn by warriors of the old civilization. Increases the wearer's strength, but slightly reduces flask healing.

title: Horned Warrior Armor
description: Armor worn by the Horned Warriors of the realm of shadow. Heavy lamellar armor of the ancient civilization, worn by warriors who were once entrusted with defending the divine beast rites.

title: Horned Warrior Gauntlets
description: Gauntlets worn by the Horned Warriors of the realm of shadow. Part of the ancient lamellar armor set of warriors chosen to serve the divine beast.

title: Horned Warrior Greaves
description: Greaves worn by the Horned Warriors of the realm of shadow. Part of the ancient lamellar armor set of warriors who protected the divine beast rites of the old civilization.

title: Caterpillar Mask
description: A mask worn by the Hornsent. A simple cloth mask suggesting the wriggling form of a caterpillar, worn by one of the ancient people who once inhabited the realm of shadow before the purge.

title: Braided Cord Robe
description: Robe worn by the Hornsent. A simple braided cord robe of the ancient people of the shadow realm. Enhances watchful and vengeful spirits summoned by the Horned Bairn, and boosts the damage of the Watchful Spirit incantation.

title: Braided Arm Wraps
description: Arm wraps worn by the Hornsent. Simple braided wrappings for the arms, worn by one of the last survivors of the ancient people slaughtered in the shadow realm's purge.

title: Soiled Loincloth
description: A soiled loincloth worn by the Hornsent. A simple, worn cloth garment, the last vestige of one who has endured countless hardships in the ruined realm of shadow.

title: Igon's Helm
description: Hat worn by Igon the dragonhunter. A battered traveling hat adorned with various pieces of salvaged gear, worn by the obsessive hunter who has dedicated his life to slaying Bayle the Dread.

title: Igon's Armor
description: Armor worn by Igon the dragonhunter. A patchwork garment covered with salvaged gauntlets and other scavenged gear, worn by a battlefield scavenger turned relentless dragon-slayer.

title: Igon's Gauntlets
description: Gauntlets worn by Igon the dragonhunter. Mismatched gauntlets scavenged from various fallen warriors, worn by one consumed by hatred for Bayle the Dread.

title: Igon's Loincloth
description: Loincloth worn by Igon the dragonhunter. A tattered cloth garment, all that covers the lower half of the obsessive dragonhunter who has long since lost his legs in his quest for vengeance.

title: Fang Helm
description: A helm fashioned from the fang of a great beast. Worn by Red Bear, a fierce warrior who has taken on aspects of the wild beast they venerate, this primitive helm inspires dread in those who face it.

title: Iron Rivet Armor
description: Armor worn by Red Bear. Heavy iron armor reinforced with crude rivets, worn by a warrior who has abandoned refinement for brute strength. Offers solid protection against most damage types.

title: Iron Rivet Gauntlets
description: Gauntlets worn by Red Bear. Crude iron gauntlets reinforced with rivets, worn by a wild warrior of the realm of shadow.

title: Iron Rivet Greaves
description: Greaves worn by Red Bear. Heavy rivet-studded leg armor worn by the formidable warrior of the realm of shadow.

title: Leather Headband
description: A leather headband worn by highland warriors of the realm of shadow. A simple but sturdy band of leather worn by those who travel the rugged highlands, offering modest protection.

title: Gloried Attire
description: Chest attire of the highland warriors found in Rauh Base. A cape-adorned garment of warriors who fought in the ancient highlands. A gloried variant featuring a light red scarf and flowing cape.

title: Leather Crown
description: A leather crown worn by highland warriors of the realm of shadow. A more ornate head covering worn by warriors of the rugged highlands, offering better protection than the simple headband.

title: Highland Attire
description: Chest attire of the highland warriors found in Scadu Altus. A traveling garment worn by warriors of the ancient highlands. A simpler variant of the Gloried Attire, without the cape.

title: Leather Arm Wraps
description: Arm wraps worn by highland warriors of the realm of shadow. Light leather wrappings for the arms, worn by travelers of the rugged highlands.

title: Leather Leg Wraps
description: Leg wraps worn by highland warriors of the realm of shadow. Light leather wrappings for the legs, worn by those who traverse the difficult terrain of the ancient highlands.

title: Messmer Soldier Helm
description: Helm worn by soldiers in service of Messmer the Impaler. A practical iron helm bearing the motifs of Messmer's forces, worn by the common soldiers who carry out his commands in the realm of shadow.

title: Messmer Soldier Armor
description: Armor worn by soldiers in service of Messmer the Impaler. A caped chest armor of Messmer's rank-and-file troops, bearing the serpent iconography of their commander.

title: Messmer Soldier Gauntlets
description: Gauntlets worn by soldiers in service of Messmer the Impaler. Part of the standard-issue armor of Messmer's forces in the realm of shadow.

title: Messmer Soldier Greaves
description: Greaves worn by soldiers in service of Messmer the Impaler. Part of the standard-issue armor of Messmer's forces, offering modest protection for the common soldier.

title: Messmer's Helm
description: Helm worn by Messmer the Impaler. The crested helm of the Impaler himself, bearing the flame-red hair of Marika's son. Improves Fire Knight skills and incantations of Messmer's flame.

title: Messmer's Armor
description: Armor worn by Messmer the Impaler. The Greco-Roman style chest armor of Marika's shadowed son, who was consigned to the realm of shadow and set ablaze the lands and peoples therein.

title: Messmer's Gauntlets
description: Gauntlets worn by Messmer the Impaler. Part of the distinctive armor set of Marika's forsaken son, who rules the realm of shadow with his impaling flame.

title: Messmer's Greaves
description: Greaves worn by Messmer the Impaler. Part of the armor set of Marika's forsaken son, who was cast into the shadow realm and made to purge all those who did not serve the Erdtree.

title: Helm of Night
description: Helm of the Swordhand of Night. Dark steel armor etched with fingerprint patterns, worn by those who serve the Night. The material is said to be semi-corporeal, cool to the touch.

title: Armor of Night
description: Chest armor of the Swordhand of Night. Dark, nearly weightless steel armor etched with fingerprint patterns. The material is semi-corporeal and cool to the touch, offering ethereal protection.

title: Gauntlets of Night
description: Gauntlets of the Swordhand of Night. Dark, semi-corporeal gauntlets of those who serve the Night, etched with the fingerprint patterns of their order.

title: Greaves of Night
description: Greaves of the Swordhand of Night. Dark, semi-corporeal leg armor of those who serve the Night, etched with the fingerprint patterns that mark their allegiance.

title: Oathseeker Knight Helm
description: Helm worn by Oathseeker Knights who followed Miquella into the realm of shadow. A finely crafted dark steel helm adorned with gold trim, worn by the knights who pledged themselves to Miquella's cause.

title: Oathseeker Knight Armor
description: Armor worn by Oathseeker Knights who followed Miquella into the realm of shadow. Elegantly crafted dark steel chest armor with gold detailing, worn by those who swore an oath to the gentle demigod.

title: Oathseeker Knight Gauntlets
description: Gauntlets worn by Oathseeker Knights. Part of the dark gold-trimmed armor of the knights who followed Miquella into the Land of Shadow.

title: Oathseeker Knight Greaves
description: Greaves worn by Oathseeker Knights. Part of the dark gold-trimmed armor of those who pledged their oath to Miquella and followed him into the realm of shadow.

title: Rakshasa Helm
description: Helm worn by Rakshasa, a formidable warrior found in the Eastern Nameless Mausoleum. Blood-stained dark iron helm of a warrior who has made a pact to deal more damage at the cost of their own defenses.

title: Rakshasa Armor
description: Armor worn by Rakshasa. Blood-caked dark armor of a warrior who has embraced a pact that boosts all damage dealt but weakens their own protection. Each piece increases damage dealt and taken by 2%.

title: Rakshasa Gauntlets
description: Gauntlets worn by Rakshasa. Part of the blood-drenched armor of a warrior who has made a pact trading defense for offensive power. Each piece increases damage dealt and taken by 2%.

title: Rakshasa Greaves
description: Greaves worn by Rakshasa. Part of the blood-stained armor of a warrior who has embraced a pact that empowers their strikes at the cost of their own resilience. Each piece increases damage dealt and taken by 2%.

title: Rellana's Helm
description: Helm worn by Rellana, Twin Moon Knight. An elegant helm adorned with twin crescent moons, bearing the red hair of a Carian royal who pledged her blade and sorcery to Messmer.

title: Rellana's Armor
description: Armor worn by Rellana, Twin Moon Knight. Elegantly crafted armor of a Carian royal who mastered both moonlight sorcery and fire in service of Messmer, featuring a distinctive breastplate.

title: Rellana's Gloves
description: Gloves worn by Rellana, Twin Moon Knight. Part of the elegant armor of the Carian royal who wields twin blades of moon and fire in the shadow realm.

title: Rellana's Greaves
description: Greaves worn by Rellana, Twin Moon Knight. Part of the elegant armor of Rennala's younger sister, who forsook the academy to pledge herself to Messmer in the realm of shadow.

title: Shadow Militiaman Helm
description: Helm worn by Shadow Militiamen. A hooded mask with glowing eyes worn by the shadowy militia troops who serve in the Shadow Keep. Particularly resistant to poison and scarlet rot.

title: Shadow Militiaman Armor
description: Armor worn by Shadow Militiamen. The shrouded attire of shadowy militia operatives who prowl the Shadow Keep, offering good protection against poison and scarlet rot.

title: Shadow Militiaman Gauntlets
description: Gauntlets worn by Shadow Militiamen. Part of the shadowy militia attire, offering good resistance to poison and scarlet rot.

title: Shadow Militiaman Greaves
description: Greaves worn by Shadow Militiamen. Part of the shrouded attire of the shadow realm's militia troops, particularly resistant to status effects.

title: Helm of Solitude
description: Steel helm of the Knights of the Solitary Gaol. Part of a heavy armor set that covers the whole body in overlapping plates of steel. The nameless mausoleums of the realm of shadow are said to hold the spirits of warriors who lost their names, or their hearts.

title: Armor of Solitude
description: Chest armor of the Knights of the Solitary Gaol. Heavy overlapping plates of darkened steel worn by knights who guard the nameless mausoleums, where those who lost their names or hearts are interred.

title: Gauntlets of Solitude
description: Gauntlets of the Knights of the Solitary Gaol. Part of the heavy overlapping steel armor set worn by those who guard the nameless mausoleums of the realm of shadow.

title: Greaves of Solitude
description: Greaves of the Knights of the Solitary Gaol. Part of the heavy overlapping steel armor worn by the nameless knights who guard the mausoleums of those who have lost their names and hearts.

title: Thiollier's Mask
description: Mask worn by Thiollier, a devoted follower of St. Trina. A practical mask worn by a perfumer who has pledged himself to the sleeping saint, seeking oblivion in her gentle slumber.

title: Thiollier's Garb
description: Garb worn by Thiollier, a devoted follower of St. Trina. A traveling cloak and garb worn by a perfumer who devotes himself to the sleeping saint, seeking the peaceful oblivion she represents.

title: Thiollier's Gloves
description: Gloves worn by Thiollier, a devoted follower of St. Trina. Part of the traveling attire of a perfumer who has followed Miquella into the realm of shadow in service of the sleeping saint.

title: Thiollier's Trousers
description: Trousers worn by Thiollier, a devoted follower of St. Trina. Part of the traveling attire of a perfumer who has made a pilgrimage to the shadow realm in devotion to the sleeping saint.

title: Verdigris Helm
description: Helm made from verdigris, a gift of an outer god. Part of an enormously hefty yet supple armor set fashioned from the mysterious rusted metal known as verdigris, said to be the blessing of an outer god.

title: Verdigris Armor
description: Chest armor made from verdigris, a gift of an outer god. Fashioned from an unusual metal known as verdigris, possessed of an enormously hefty yet supple strength thanks to its rusted nature.

title: Verdigris Gauntlets
description: Gauntlets made from verdigris, a gift of an outer god. Part of the heaviest and most protective armor set in the realm of shadow, fashioned from the unusual outer-god metal.

title: Verdigris Greaves
description: Greaves made from verdigris, a gift of an outer god. Part of the heaviest and most protective armor set in the realm of shadow, boasting the highest poise in all the Land of Shadow.

title: Young Lion's Helm
description: Helm of Promised Consort Radahn, Miquella's chosen lord. Bearing the red hair inherited from Radagon, this helm was donned by Radahn after he heard a murmur — Miquella awaits thee, O promised consort.

title: Young Lion's Armor
description: Armor of Promised Consort Radahn, who was chosen as Miquella's lord. Gold-trimmed plate armor bearing the lion motif, donned by Radahn after his soul was guided by Miquella's gentle call.

title: Young Lion's Gauntlets
description: Gauntlets of Promised Consort Radahn. Part of the armor donned by Radahn in his role as Miquella's chosen consort, featuring omen horn-like protrusions at the elbows.

title: Young Lion's Greaves
description: Greaves of Promised Consort Radahn. Part of the armor worn by Radahn as Miquella's consort, completing the gold-trimmed plate armor of the young lion who answered the empyrean's call.
